instruction: 如果公园里人很多，地面被雪覆盖会怎样？
note: temporal/weather full scene regeneration; environment overhaul
scene_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a park scene on a snowy winter day. In the center foreground, a young East Asian man in his late 20s stands smiling; he has light skin, short curly dark hair, and wears a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers. To his right, a Golden Retriever dog sits with a friendly expression, its light golden fur contrasting against the snow. The ground is covered with a layer of white snow, showing subtle textures, footprints, and scattered leaves. In the middle ground, numerous people are scattered throughout the park, dressed in winter coats, scarves, and hats, some walking in pairs, others standing in groups, adding a bustling atmosphere. Deciduous trees with bare or snow-dusted branches rise on the left and background, their dark trunks and branches standing out against the white snow. Wooden benches with metal frames are visible on the left and right, partially covered with snow. A paved path winds through the park behind the man and dog. In the background, a calm water body reflects the overcast gray sky, with a distant city skyline faintly visible. The lighting is soft and diffused from an overcast sky, casting gentle shadows on the snow and creating a cold, wintery atmosphere with a dominant palette of white, gray, and muted colors. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level, facing the man and dog, with the man centered in the foreground; Spatial positions: man in CENTER foreground, dog to RIGHT of man in foreground, trees on LEFT and BACKGROUND, benches on LEFT and RIGHT in BACKGROUND, paved path in BACKGROUND, water body in far BACKGROUND, sky at TOP. Style reference: People details: original man – East Asian, young in his late 20s, light skin, short curly dark hair, smiling, wearing light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, white sneakers; added people – various ages, dressed in winter coats, scarves, hats, scattered throughout; Surface materials: original grass (soft, green), path (paved), benches (wooden/metal); changed to snow (white, textured, with footprints), winter clothing fabrics (coats, scarves); People details: original man – East Asian, young in his late 20s, light skin, short curly dark hair, smiling, wearing light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, white sneakers; added people – various ages, dressed in winter coats, scarves, hats, scattered throughout; Overall atmosphere: original peaceful sunny day; changed to cold, wintery, bustling with people.

instruction: 如果这一束花分成两束独立的玫瑰，会是什么样子？
note: physical/recomposition full scene; object count & spatial layout change
scene_prompt: An eye-level photograph, slightly from the left, of a rustic wooden table in an indoor setting. The table has a light brown surface with prominent wood grain and knots, under soft diffused natural light. On the table, two independent bouquets of roses are placed side by side, each consisting of a mix of deep red and light pink roses in various stages of bloom, with green leaves and thorny stems visible. Each bouquet is tied with its own dark green satin ribbon, forming bows similar to the original arrangement. To the left, a window with a white frame is partially visible, allowing soft daylight to enter, casting gentle shadows of the bouquets onto the table. The background on the right features a smooth, light-colored matte wall, providing a neutral backdrop. The light creates soft highlights on the rose petals and ribbon surfaces, enhancing the textures. The scene maintains a serene and cozy atmosphere with warm tones from the wood and natural colors from the flowers. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: Eye-level photograph, slightly from the left, facing the bouquet on the table; Spatial positions: Bouquet in CENTER FOREGROUND on the wooden table; window on LEFT WALL, partially visible; plain light-colored wall on RIGHT, background; Lighting quality and direction: Soft, diffused natural light from the left window, casting soft shadows on the table; no harsh highlights; Surface materials and textures: Rustic wooden table with visible grain and knots, matte finish; velvety rose petals; satin-like dark green ribbon with slight sheen; glossy green leaves with veins; smooth matte wall; white window frame. Style reference: Surface materials and textures: Rustic wooden table with visible grain and knots, matte finish; velvety rose petals; satin-like dark green ribbon with slight sheen; glossy green leaves with veins; smooth matte wall; white window frame; Spatial positions: Bouquet in CENTER FOREGROUND on the wooden table; window on LEFT WALL, partially visible; plain light-colored wall on RIGHT, background; Dominant color palette: Warm wooden tones (light brown), reds and pinks of roses, dark green from ribbon and leaves, soft white daylight; Overall atmosphere: Serene, cozy, indoor setting with natural daylight, calm and peaceful.

instruction: 如果这间阳光明媚的房间突然变成深夜，会是什么样子？
如果现在是秋天，树叶全部变红变黄，地面上铺满落叶会怎样？
note: temporal/seasonal full scene; colour palette and ground cover change
scene_prompt: An eye-level photograph of an outdoor park scene on a bright sunny day. In the center foreground, an East Asian man in his early 30s with light skin with warm undertone, short dark curly hair, round face, and a smile, wearing a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers, stands with his left hand gently resting on the back of a golden retriever dog sitting on the grass to his right. The dog has thick golden fur and is looking attentively forward. The grass is vibrant green but now partially covered with a dense layer of fallen leaves in shades of deep red, bright yellow, and burnt orange, creating a patchy autumn carpet. In the background, several large trees have their foliage transformed to rich autumn colors; leaves are a mix of crimson red and golden yellow, with some branches beginning to show bare twigs. Two dark wooden benches with metal frames are positioned on a light gray paved path behind the man and dog, one bench on the left side and one on the right side of the path. Beyond the path, a calm body of water reflects the clear blue sky, with a distant cityscape silhouette featuring various buildings and a faint tower. The lighting is intense daylight from above, casting sharp, defined shadows of the man, dog, and trees onto the leaf-strewn grass. The overall atmosphere is crisp and serene, evoking a peaceful autumn morning. Photorealistic, high resolution, natural color palette. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level, facing the man and dog in the center foreground; Spatial positions: Man and dog in CENTER foreground, trees in BACKGROUND (left and right), benches in BACKGROUND on a paved path, water in FAR BACKGROUND, cityscape in FAR BACKGROUND. Style reference: For people: East Asian man with light skin with warm undertone, young in his early 30s, short dark curly hair, round face, smiling, average build, wearing a light blue short-sleeved button-up shirt, khaki pants, and white sneakers; Surface materials and textures: Textured green grass (partially covered by fallen leaves), rough tree bark, smooth fabric of the man's light blue shirt and khaki pants, soft fur of the golden retriever.
